name: golang-github-cloudfoundry-gosigar-dev
title: golang-github-cloudfoundry-gosigar-dev
summary: golang implementation of the sigar API
description:
golang implementation of the sigar API
Go sigar is a golang implementation of the sigar API. The Go version
of sigar has a very similar interface, but is being written from
scratch in pure go/cgo, rather than cgo bindings for libsigar.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-cloudfoundry-gosigar-dev because golang implementation of the sigar API.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-cloudfoundry-gosigar-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-cloudfoundry-gosigar-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-cloudfoundry-gosigar-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
